---
title: "first"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-28"
---
Load a dataset

```{r}
setwd("D:/Student Drive/R/Dataset/Datasets")
cars93 <- read.csv("Cars93.csv")
head(cars93)
```

Frequency Counts of Type of cars
```{r}
table(cars93$Type)
```

```{r}
setwd("D:/Student Drive/R/Dataset/Datasets")
mean_price <- cars93 %>% group_by(Type) %>% 
  summarise(mu_price=mean(Price))
ggplot(data = mean_price,aes(x=Type,y=mu_price,fill=Type))+
  geom_bar(stat = 'identity')+
  labs(y="Mean Price",x="Car Type")
```
```
```{python}
library(reticulate)
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df.head()
```
